name: Oatmeal Chocolate Chip Cookies # 2
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C).
2. Grease a large baking sheet.
3. Cream shortening and sugars together in a mixing bowl until light and fluffy.
4. Add eggs and vanilla; beat well.
5. Sift flour, baking soda, cinnamon, and salt together; blend into the creamed mixture.
6. Stir in oats, chocolate morsels, and pecans.
7. Drop dough by level tablespoonfuls, about two inches apart, onto the prepared baking sheet.
8. Bake for 10 to 12 minutes or until golden brown.
9. Cool on wire racks.
